avoid: Using Path.name attribute when displaying file paths to users (shows only basename)
Assuming filename alone is sufficient identification in multi-file operations
recommended_action: When displaying file paths in user-facing output, use the full path not just the filename
For Path objects, use str(src) to get full path, not src.name which returns only the filename
Check diff/output functions that display file identifiers to ensure they show complete paths for clarity

avoid: Leaving print() or logging.debug() statements in middle of token generation loops
Failing to clean up temporary debugging code from code paths that are performance-critical or output-sensitive
recommended_action: Remove debug print statements from production code
Debug statements like print() calls left in tokenizer/parser modules can interfere with token output and cause parsing failures
Scan for stray debugging code before merging
